narrative:
Pickerington City has 17,480 registered voters, with 60.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.9 percentage points.
